input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.1.3
            TITLE: all suspension mounting points must be visible at technical inspection by direct view or by

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.1.3: All suspension mounting points must be visible at Technical Inspection by direct view or by
V.3.1.3 All suspension mounting points must be visible at Technical Inspection by direct view or by 
removing any covers.

final_answer: All suspension mounting points must be visible at Technical Inspection by direct view or by removing any covers.
